name: Tuscany
startIntroPart1: Greetings, illustrious Cosimo, first Grand Duke of Tuscany and master of the Medici legacy. You did not merely inherit a name; you forged a dynasty that redefined the power of the Renaissance.
startIntroPart2: Magnificent Duke, will you rule through the cold calculation of statecraft or the vibrant light of humanism? Your subjects await the return of the Golden Age. Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: Your presence has become a blemish on the landscape. It is time for a pruning.
attacked: You mistake my refinement for weakness. Many have made that error; few survived to regret it.
defeated: The sun sets on the Arno. Even the finest bronze eventually yields to the elements.
introduction: Welcome to Tuscany. I am Cosimo Medici, Grand Duke of Tuscany. Speak, and let your words be as polished as my marble.
hateHello: I have ledgers more interesting than your company. What is it?
tradeRequest: Prosperity is the mother of the arts. Let us ensure both flourish through this agreement.
